title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, described as a publicly available Mythos-class model with strong capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. The company implemented safety systems to limit capabilities in high-risk domains like cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, a publicly available Mythos-class model. The summary lists its capabilities across software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. It also notes that Anthropic added safety systems intended to limit the model's capabilities in high-risk domains, specifically cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry.
